productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Wires White Flip Flops
description: White flip flops for men from adidas. Printed design on the insole is inspired by lazy afternoons looking out the window. Pair them with a similar toned tee and fitted denims or shorts. Upper Fabric thong straps with the adidas patented 3-Stripes Fabric toe separator Adidas patented 3-Stripes on the axis of the Flip Flops PU footbed with print for all-day massage feel with printed branding Outsole TPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for maximum traction shoe care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not machine wash
